name: village-green-demo-data
description: Deterministic RI-lore demo dataset generator + loaders for Village Green

//.doctor: schema-drift check only (also auto-runs before every generating command)
//.seed:db: generate the dataset -> direct SQL INSERTs into the dev DB (no API needed)
//.seed:api: generate the dataset -> POST to the app's /op/appdata importer (needs API + mock OIDC)
//.emit: generate the dataset -> write demo-appdata.jsonl locally (meta date pinned for byte-identical output)
//.import: POST an EXISTING app-data file as-is (default demo-appdata.jsonl; -- --import=<file>); no generation, no doctor
//.export: the app's GET /op/appdata exporter -> appdata-export.jsonl (whatever is in the DB now, serialized by the app)
//.roundtrip: seed:db -> emit -> seed:api -> sanity, exercising both load paths end to end
